seo.title: About — John Doe | Engineer, studio founder
seo.description: Background in networks, UX systems, and bootstrapped B2B products spanning design intelligence feeds, LLM infrastructure, cloud tooling, and security adjacent services.
seo.keywords: John Doe biography, software engineer, design systems, LLM platform founder, cloud SaaS, traffic integrity, bootstrapped portfolio, technical writing

books.title: Books & long-form
books.intro: Practical references aimed at builders shipping under real constraints — not trend essays.

bio.short: I started in network and backend engineering, then spent years where UX systems meet large content and commerce stacks. Today I split time between PixelDocket (structured design-market data), PromptHarbor (LLM routing and evaluation hooks), VantageFence (traffic integrity), Alto CRM (lightweight ops CRM), and StratusSearch (catalog search infrastructure).
long: The through-line is boring reliability: observability first, narrow contracts with customers, and documentation that matches production behavior.
I write publicly to document trade-offs — grants, redesigns, model drift, and the parts of GTM that do not fit a keynote.

values.title: Evidence over narrative
values.desc: Share numbers, failure modes, and support load — not aspirational positioning.

values.title: Long horizons
values.desc: Markets and stacks churn; maintainable systems and patient distribution compound.

values.title: Narrow scope
values.desc: Prefer a sharp wedge in one vertical over ten half-built experiments.

values.title: Security aware
values.desc: Treat adversarial traffic and model misuse as product requirements, not afterthoughts.
